## Tests
- [ ] New behavior has tests.
- [ ] Vector tests still pass (`swift test`).

## Conventions
- [ ] Public API matches [RFC-0001](https://github.com/bare-swift/bare-swift/blob/main/rfcs/0001-api-conventions.md).
- [ ] DocC updated if public API changed.
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added.
